content.full_text:
City of Half Moon Bay  
CITY COUNCIL  
CITY HALL  
P.O. BOX 338  
HALF MOON BAY, CALIFORNIA 94019

September 29, 1992

John Wallace  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
428 J Street, Suite #800  
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Mr. Wallace:

I would like an advice letter from the FPPC regarding the ability of Councilman/CDA member David Iverson and myself to vote on the renewal of the City of Half Moon Bay's contract with Burns & Watry (Kelseyville) for redevelopment consultation services. James Burns, a partner of that corporation, has served as the City's redevelopment director. The Burns & Watry contract expired on Sept. 24.

This item will be on our October 6 meeting agenda.

If you have any questions, my phone number is (415) 726-7837. Thank you.

Sincerely,

[signature]

Deborah Ruddock  
Council member, CDA member  
City of Half Moon Bay
